summary_sections.title: Overview
summary_sections.content_html: Mirrors and Lenses is a key topic in Geometric and Physical Optics for AP Physics 2.

summary_sections.title: Key Concepts
summary_sections.content_html: This lesson covers the fundamental principles of mirrors and lenses.

summary_sections.title: Applications
summary_sections.content_html: Understanding mirrors and lenses has applications in various areas of physics and engineering.
